True Wisdom Practitioners Association

A welcoming space for all who are drawn to the timeless wisdom of the East. Together, we explore the depths of Buddhist and Chan teachings — cultivating mindful living, plant-based wellness, and a gentle, grounded approach to emotional well-being.
